heuristics: Segment IQR within (town, flat_type) where n>=30
Price per sqm segment IQR outlier
assumptions: HDB resale prices are generally right-skewed; 3*IQR is conservative
Small segments (<30) use global rules only
Anomalies are flagged for review; dataset may contain none

month.description: Month must be YYYY-MM format within 2012-01 to 2016-12

town.description: Town must be non-null and match known HDB towns in dataset

flat_type.description: Flat type must match known categories in dataset

flat_model.description: Flat model must match known categories in dataset

storey_range.description: Storey range must match NN TO NN pattern
